'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=106Kr_fYi6WwwtjRX4pxcbv9Jn8MSxwuQCjVEH4dAZM-1774541257-1.0.1.1-wvsFLzM0RSFDG6oqBwQ_I.63Zh_pn9M.QWFNINP25oo"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
